steps.title: Locate the MSX row in the table
steps.content: The student needs the worldwide units sold for the MSX manufactured by ASCII Corp. Search the table for the row where “System” = MSX and “Manufacturer” = ASCII Corp.

steps.title: Read the value from the correct column
steps.content: The MSX row shows 4,000,000 in the “Approximate number of units sold worldwide” column. The other three values—18,450,000, 1,600,000, and 2,650,000—belong to the Atari 2600, Amiga, and TurboGrafx-16 respectively, representing a misread of a different system's data. That matches choice B — B is correct.
